# Fortify - Security SaaS & Startup

> Fortify is a comprehensive, cutting-edge data protection and security SaaS solution. This file provides an overview of the key pages, documentation, and resources on our website for LLMs.

## Main Pages

- [Home Page](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/) - Our primary banner, features overview, customer testimonials, and quick start guides.
- [About Us](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/about/) - Discover Fortify's mission and our dedication to safeguarding your data.
- [Pricing](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/pricing/) - Flexible subscription plans (Starter and Professional) for security management.
- [Features](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/features/) - Deep dive into Advanced Detection, Robust Data Encryption, and Automated Response.
- [Contact](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/contact/) - Get in touch with the Fortify security team.
- [Blog](https://pontora-marketing.vercel.app/blog/) - Stay updated with our latest security insights, reviews, and tech guides.
